message:
feat(fcp-sdk): add formatter helper with HTML/Markdown rendering and fallback

Implement the SDK formatter helper (IDEA-07.1 / bd-1s32):

- formatting.rs: Formatter::render_with_fallback(input, mode) that
  returns RenderResult { rendered, parse_mode_used }, supporting
  FormatMode::Html, FormatMode::Markdown, and FormatMode::Plaintext.
  The fallback path strips markup safely and escapes control characters
  when primary rendering fails, ensuring deterministic output and
  indicating whether fallback occurred via the parse_mode_used field.
- formatter_tests.rs: unit tests covering well-formed and malformed
  inputs for each format mode, verifying fallback behavior and output
  determinism
- lib.rs: declare formatting module and re-export FormatError,
  FormatMode, Formatter, and RenderResult from crate root
- prelude.rs: add formatting types to the SDK prelude for ergonomic
  imports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
